linkingGroups.panelDescription: Manage channel linking centrally for this amplifier.

linkingGroups.outputMuteDescription: Build output mute link groups for this amp by adding valid channel groups.

linkingGroups.delayOutDescription: Build output delay link groups for this amp by adding valid channel groups.

linkingGroups.outputEqDescription: Build output EQ link groups for this amp by adding valid channel groups.

presets.factoryResetDescription: Reset the device to factory defaults. All settings and presets will be lost. This cannot be undone.
